17493.description: Marek Quilgate the 2nd was first described as compact, broad shouldered, fair hair, dark eyes, with restless bearing.

17494.description: Wren Elovar the 13th was first described as compact, sturdy, fair hair, blue eyes, with bold bearing.

17495.description: Osric Korddale was first described as average height, lean, brown hair, dark eyes, with restless bearing.

17496.description: Arno Belshore the 2nd was first described as tall, lean, auburn hair, blue eyes, with restless bearing.

17497.description: Saren Harwood was first described as average height, heavyset, silver streaked hair, dark eyes, with steady bearing.

17498.description: Quin Dorstone the 2nd was first described as towering, slender, brown hair, amber eyes, with bold bearing.

17499.description: Bram Haradia the 2nd was first described as compact, lean, black hair, dark eyes, with somber bearing.
